dailyInsight.title: AI资本开支、产业交付与市场回报进入同步验证期
dailyInsight.body: 今日重点观察AI投入能否转化为云业务、订单和利润，汽车产业的智能化投资能否兼顾交付与现金流，以及国内外资本市场如何重新定价增长与风险。

stories.title: The Guardian报道：Chasing new skills, going back to basics and pushing for collective action: how software engineers are adapting to AI
stories.summary: 软件工程是 2022 年美国薪酬最高的职业之一，但人工智能的出现扰乱了它，导致多人裁员和就业不足。 每个工作日，软件工程师马特都期待着乘坐四个小时的火车前往纽约波林。现在是他开发自己的项目的时候了：一款基于浏览器的视频游戏，每一行代码都是他自己编写的。 “I am actively trying to keep my axe sharp,” said Matt, who did not want to use his actual name, to protect his employment.在过去的六个月中，马特的工作逐渐从编码、解决问题和软件架构转向审查人工智能生成的代码。

stories.originalTitle: Will your job be replaced by AI? Here are the roles most affected
stories.originalSummary: The report says that Artificial Intelligence companies make vast claims about their tools replacing human labour - our charts show what's happening. It presents the development as current reported information and does not treat market expectations as confirmed results. For companies and investors, the practical question is whether it changes demand, costs, supply chains, financing, compliance obligations, delivery schedules, or sustainable earnings. Readers should compare the report with later company announcements, regulatory filings, financial disclosures, independent industry statistics, customer responses, and operating data before reaching a firm conclusion about its lasting significance.
